name: my-ui-kit
description: Tailwind-based UI Kit, plug-and-play seperti Bootstrap

scripts.build:css: npm run build:scss && npm run build:tw
scripts.build:css:prod: sass core/scss/main.scss core/dist/_compiled.css --style=compressed --no-source-map && tailwindcss -i core/dist/_compiled.css -o core/dist/ui-kit.min.css --minify
